title: NR14 8TZ, Anglian Water Services Limited: environmental permit issued - EPR/LP3499SY/V006
body: "The Environment Agency publish permits that they issue under the Industrial Emissions Directive (IED).  This decision includes the permit and decision document for:    Operator name: Anglian Water Services Limited   Installation name: Whitlingham Sludge Treatment Centre (STC)   Permit number: EPR/LP3499SY   "
